title: Gokak Falls
tagline: Gokak Falls — heritage city of Karnataka

overview.short: The Gokak Falls is a waterfall located on the Ghataprabha River in Belagavi district of Karnataka, India.
overview.description: The Gokak Falls is a waterfall located on the Ghataprabha River in Belagavi district of Karnataka, India. The waterfall is 6.5 kilometers away from Gokak town.

topPlaces.name: Gokak Falls, Belgaum
topPlaces.description: Gokak Falls is a town in Belagavi district in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is under the control of municipal corporation Konnur, Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Konnur
topPlaces.description: Konnur is a municipal council in the Belagavi District of Karnataka, India. It is located at 16.2°N 74.75°E / 16.2; 74.75 and has an average elevation of 606 metres (1988 feet).

topPlaces.name: Konnur (Rural)
topPlaces.description: Konnur is a city in Gokak taluk, Belgaum district in Karnataka, India. The Konnur railway station (Gokak road) is located in Konnur 11 km from Gokak.

topPlaces.name: Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary also known as Ghataprabha Bird Sanctuary is a protected area and wildlife sanctuary located in the Belagavi district of the Indian state of Karnataka covering an area of 29.78 km². It is situated along the banks of the Ghataprabha River and is renowned for its diverse bird population, particularly migratory species that visit during the winter months.

topPlaces.name: Gokak
topPlaces.description: Gokak or Gōkāka is a taluka headquarters in the Belagavi district of Karnataka state, India. It is located around 70 km from Belagavi at the confluence of the Ghataprabha and Markandeya rivers.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gokak Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gokak Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gokak Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Belagavi Airport (41 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (102 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gokak Falls?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gokak Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gokak Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Gokak Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gokak Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gokak Falls, Belgaum, Konnur, Konnur (Rural), Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary, Gokak.
